data.title: Trend Research address withdraws another 1.0045 million UNI from Binance, worth over $10.69 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, the Trend Research address under LD Capital withdrew 1.0045 million UNI from Binance 10 minutes ago, worth more than 10.69 million US dollars. .
In the past 9 days, Trend Research has withdrawn a total of 5.41 million UNI (about 51.65 million US dollars) and 228,700 COMP (about 11.29 million US dollars) from Binance, with an overall floating profit of 6.18 million US dollars.

data.title: Cardano's ADA Price Surge Signals Potential for Further Gains
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, the native token of the Cardano network, ADA, has experienced a significant price increase, marking a potential end to its prolonged downtrend. Since June 22, ADA has risen over 70%, with a notable 75% gain recorded between June 22 and July 18. This upward trajectory saw ADA bottom out at $0.50 in June and reach a 20-week high of $0.89 on Friday, indicating a strong recovery.

The recent rally has been fueled by multiple bullish signals, including the behavior of the Bollinger Bands volatility indicator. Historically, when ADA's price touches the upper band of the Bollinger Bands, it suggests an imminent rise in volatility, potentially leading to substantial price rallies. Previous instances in 2021, 2022, and 2024 saw ADA's price increase by 1,500%, 117%, and 300%, respectively. The current squeeze of the Bollinger Bands, coupled with ADA's price touching the upper band, adds weight to the possibility of another significant rally.

Despite the recent gains, ADA's price remains nearly four times lower than its all-time high of $3.10 achieved in 2021. However, the token has shown multiple bullish signals across various time frames, indicating that the rally may continue. ADA has broken out of a bull flag on the weekly chart, converting key resistance levels, such as the 50-day and 200-day simple moving averages, into support. The measured target for this bull flag is $2.70, representing a potential 216% increase from the current price.

Further supporting the bullish outlook is the formation of a golden cross, where the 50-day SMA crossed above the 200-day SMA, reinforcing the continuation of the uptrend. Additionally, the moving average convergence divergence (MACD) indicator has produced a bullish cross, suggesting strengthening trend momentum. The weekly relative strength index (RSI) indicates that ADA has room to grow before reaching overheated levels, similar to previous cycle tops in 2018, 2021, and December 2024.

Despite the daily RSI being at 80, historical data suggests ADA could rally an additional 130% to reach $1.80, according to analyst Deezy. This analysis is based on past performance when ADA's daily RSI hit similar levels. However, readers are reminded that this article does not constitute investment advice, and all trading decisions should be made after conducting thorough research, as investments carry inherent risks.

data.title: Giants Protocol: Considering locking 90% of team tokens
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Giants Protocol Core issued an announcement that it is currently considering locking more than 90% of the team's tokens to serve its long-term strategy - starting from real-world assets (RWA) and promoting "global asset tokenization". 
Giants Protocol said that in order to ensure full compliance and supervision on a global scale, it is studying a compliant listing (IPO) plan in the United States to further consolidate its vision: to build a completely autonomous, decentralized and fair economic system for the world. And it will conduct roadshows for GRWA in major cities around the world.

data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will adjust the collateral ratio of multiple assets under the portfolio margin model in two batches at 06:00 (UTC) on July 22, 2025 and 06:00 (UTC) on July 25, 2025. Among them, 6 assets such as FLOKI and PENGU will be adjusted on July 22, and 6 assets such as DASH and BAT will be adjusted on July 25. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Ethereum Developers Adjust Fusaka Upgrade Plans, Discuss Glamsterdam Hard Fork
data.description:
According to PANews, the 216th Ethereum Execution Layer Core Developers Meeting (ACDE) revealed that developers have decided to remove EIP 7907 from the Fusaka upgrade. This decision means that the size limit for Ethereum smart contract code will remain unchanged for the foreseeable future. A version of this EIP might be reconsidered for the Glamsterdam hard fork, although its inclusion in the next hard fork is not guaranteed.

Tim Beiko shared a potential timeline for Fusaka's mainnet launch during the meeting. The proposed schedule includes the release of the client public testnet during the week of August 25, the first public testnet upgrade between September 22 and October 3, and the second testnet upgrade from October 6 to 10. Additionally, developers plan to initiate Fusaka Devnet-3 on July 23.

Regarding the Glamsterdam hard fork, developers have largely reached a consensus on the planned implementations. However, discussions continue on several key issues, including the "proposer-builder separation solidification mechanism" and "block-level access lists." Developers aim to finalize decisions on core code changes for the Glamsterdam upgrade within the next two to four weeks, following further input from the broader Ethereum community.

data.title: U.S. Consumer Confidence Sees Slight Increase Amid Inflation Concerns
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Joanne Hsu, the director of the University of Michigan's consumer survey, reported a slight increase in U.S. consumer confidence, rising by approximately one point to 61.8 compared to June. Although this marks a five-month high, the index remains about 16% lower than December 2024 and significantly below historical averages. Consumers are unlikely to regain confidence in the economy unless they are assured that inflation is unlikely to worsen, such as through stable trade policies in the foreseeable future.

Current survey results show minimal impact on consumer confidence from other policy changes, including the recently passed tax and spending legislation. Inflation expectations for the coming year have decreased for the second consecutive month, dropping from 5.0% last month to 4.4% this month.

Long-term inflation expectations have also declined for the third month in a row, falling from 4.0% in June to 3.6% in July. Both indices are at their lowest levels since February 2025, yet they remain higher than in December 2024, indicating that consumers still perceive a significant risk of rising inflation in the future.

data.title: BTCS, a US-listed company, rose 28.67%, having previously increased its holdings of ETH through revolving lending.
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: BTCS, a US-listed company, rose 28.67% to $8.3, after increasing its holdings of ETH through revolving loans.
In addition, it was reported on July 16 that BTCS was included in the Russell Microcap Index.

data.title: BTCS Shares Surge Following ETH Investment
data.description: According to Odaily, shares of BTCS, a publicly traded company on the U.S. stock market, have risen by 28.67%, currently priced at $8.3. This increase follows the company's decision to expand its holdings in Ethereum (ETH) through a strategy of circular lending. Additionally, on July 16, BTCS was included in the Russell Microcap Index, further influencing its stock performance.

data.description: According to BlockBeats, the preliminary estimate for the U.S. one-year inflation rate in July is 4.4%, which is below the expected 5.00% and the previous value of 5.00%.

data.title: U.S. Consumer Sentiment Index Shows Slight Improvement in July
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the preliminary reading of the University of Michigan's Consumer Sentiment Index for July in the United States is 61.8. This figure surpasses the expected value of 61.5 and shows an increase from the previous reading of 60.7.

data.title: Bitcoin Whale Transfers to Exchanges Surge, Approaching Yearly Highs
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Glassnode has reported an acceleration in the rate at which Bitcoin whales are transferring their holdings to exchanges. The seven-day moving average is nearing 12,000 Bitcoins, marking one of the highest transfer volumes this year. This surge is comparable to the spike observed in early November 2024. Although the current figures remain below last year's peak, this trend may indicate a shift in capital or profit-taking activities.

data.title: Binance Finance, One-click Coin Purchase, Flash Exchange, Leverage Listing on Chainbase (C)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance Financial Management, One-click Coin Buying, Flash Exchange Trading Platform and Leverage will be launched on Chainbase (C) according to the timeline listed below.
Binance Financial Management: C Principal Guarantee Coin Current Product will be launched on Binance Principal Guarantee Coin Platform and open for subscription at 22:00 (Eastern Time Zone 8) on July 18, 2025.
One-click Coin Buying & Selling: C Within one hour after Binance Spot is launched, you can buy coins and start trading with one click.
Flash Exchange Trading Platform: C Within one hour after Binance Spot is launched, users can exchange C for BTC, USDT or other tokens supported by the Flash Exchange Trading Platform, and the exchange is free of handling fees.
Binance Leverage: Coin Security Warehouse and Per-position Leverage will add C borrowable assets at 22:00 (Eastern Time Zone 8) on July 18, 2025, as well as C/USDT, C/USDC full position and per-position leverage trading pairs.
